payload.intent: Render the complete mechanical pocket watch illustration, drawing the circular case, crown, dial with Roman numerals and tick marks, three hands, two sub-dials, visible movement gears, and chain into a centered 600×600 viewBox. Apply a metallic/brass palette with clean line art and subtle shading to achieve a realistic vintage appearance. Ensure all specified dimensions, positions, and structural elements are implemented accurately.

payload.critique: The artifact fails to meet the core requirement of showing the internal movement; the bottom half is a solid opaque mass with no visible gears or balance wheel, and the minute tick marks are entirely absent from the dial. To fix this, you must implement a cutaway or open-heart design in the lower half of the watch to reveal the gear train and balance wheel, and add the 60 minute tick marks around the dial perimeter.

payload.intent: The primary goal is to fix the critical missing elements identified in the critique: the internal movement and the minute tick marks. I will update the spec to explicitly require a cutaway or open-heart design in the lower half of the watch to reveal the gears and balance wheel, ensuring the mechanical nature is visible. Additionally, I will reinforce the requirement for 60 distinct minute tick marks around the dial perimeter to complete the face details. These changes address the most damaging defects that prevent the artifact from meeting the core requirements.
